title: Contact | Michelle Welsh MP
meta_description: Contact the Member of Parliament for Sherwood Forest.
text_excerpt: --> Contact | Michelle Welsh MP top of page 0115 646 6219 MICHELLE WELSH MP About Help & Advice Updates Constituency Parliamentary In the News Contact More Use tab to navigate through the menu items. Contact Details Surgery meetings are by appointment only. You can contact me by email, phone or post. My team and I receive a large number of enquiries every day, and we always do our best to respond as soon as possible. Urgent or time-sensitive cases are prioritised. Constituency Office Office of Michelle Welsh MP Under One Roof 3A vine Terrace Hucknall NG15 7HN ​ 0115 646 6219 michelle.welsh.mp@parliament.uk Parliamentary Office Office of Michelle Welsh MP House of Commons London SWIA 0AA ​ 020 7219 7704 michelle.welsh.mp@parliament.uk Sign up to my newsletter bottom of page
